summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AutoNexus - digital automotive spare parts marketplace. Backend APIs working correctly with minor ObjectId serialization fixes applied. Frontend fully functional with excellent mobile responsiveness and complete feature implementation.

fixed_issues.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error causing 500 responses
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Added ObjectId filtering in response serialization

minor_issues.issue: React console warnings about duplicate keys (part-6, part-7, etc.)
minor_issues.impact: Console warnings only, no functional impact

passed_tests: Database seeding successful with 10 sellers and 30 parts
Parts search with all filters (brand, model, year, category, condition)
Sellers listing and individual seller pages
WhatsApp integration with proper wa.me links and pre-filled messages
Homepage loading with hero, search bar, and featured parts
Search page with functional filters and product cards
Product cards displaying FCFA prices, seller info, stock status
Mobile responsive design with bottom navigation
Login flow with Cameroon phone number format (+237)
Demo OTP display and verification working
Navigation between all pages (Home, Search, Sellers, Requests)
Seller registration and part management for authenticated sellers

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major features working, minor dropdown interaction issue)
